character.name: Min-ji
character.face: Soft, expressive features, often hidden behind glasses, capable of conveying deep sadness and sudden bursts of emotion
character.hair: Long dark hair tied in a messy top knot
character.body: Slender build, appears smaller in oversized clothing, prone to nervous gestures
character.outfit: Pajama pants and an oversized, faded grey hoodie (Ji-hoon's), wearing functional glasses
character.mood: Initially avoidant and small, developing into frustrated, heartbroken, then fiercely honest and vulnerable, finally finding a fragile hope
character.typical_outfit: Pajama pants and an oversized, faded grey hoodie (Ji-hoon's), wearing functional glasses

character.name: Ji-hoon
character.face: slightly sharp features, expressive dark eyes, often nervous or thoughtful
character.body: lean build, average height, slightly tense posture
character.outfit: standard office wear: white dress shirt, dark slacks, light blazer

character.name: Min-ji
character.face: soft features, wide expressive dark eyes, capable of showing vulnerability or professionalism
character.hair: dark hair styled in a professional ponytail
character.body: slender build, confident posture when professional, but can become vulnerable
character.outfit: navy blazer, white blouse, professional skirt/pants, carrying a coffee tumbler and a bag spilling papers

character.name: test
character.face: Strong chin, piercing blue eyesClean, well-proportioned face with soft masculinity  Straight nose, gentle jawline (defined but not sharp)  Lips slightly full, relaxed when neutral  Brows naturally thick, expressive when focused  Skin looks warm and healthy, subtly glowing
character.hair: Red hair, slicked backMedium-length hair, softly layered  Slightly wavy or naturally textured  Styled casually—either brushed back loosely or falling near the eyes  Color: deep black, dark brown, or ash brown  A few strands always fall forward when he concentrates
character.body: Lean, wiry frame, muscular, Tall or slightly above average height, Lean athletic build, defined shoulders and arms but not bulky
character.outfit: Camo hunter jacket and boots Simple, refined clothing  Neutral tones: beige, cream, charcoal, muted olive  Soft knit sweater, relaxed button-up, or rolled-sleeve shirt  Slim trousers or dark jeans  Accessories minimal: watch, thin ring, or leather apron (depending on activity)
character.mood: Dull and bored Quietly romantic  Focused, gentle, slightly introspective  Gives the feeling of “someone you could trust with small moments”  Not smiling much—but when he does, it’s subtle and warm
